title: Remove watermark and add full admin panel with user management, moderation, and site configuration

requirements.text: Remove any remaining watermark or Caffeine branding from all visible UI surfaces, including the landing page, scan dashboard, results page, header, and footer.

quotes: can you remove the water marker

acceptanceCriteria: No Caffeine logo, badge, or watermark text is visible on any page.
Footer displays only Truth-Lens copyright and tagline.

requirements.text: Expand the backend to support admin-specific operations: listing all registered users with their profiles, banning or removing users, viewing all scan submissions with metadata, deleting flagged submissions, and reading/writing site configuration key-value settings (e.g., max scans per user, feature flags).

quotes: Admin panel access with features like: manage users, view/moderate content submissions, and site configuration

acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only backend functions exist for: getAllUsers, banUser, deleteUser, getAllSubmissions, deleteSubmission, getSiteConfig, setSiteConfig.
All admin functions enforce role-based access control and reject non-admin callers.
Site configuration is persisted in stable storage.

requirements.text: Build a full admin dashboard UI accessible only to authenticated admin users, containing three tabbed sections: (1) User Management — a table of all registered users with name, principal ID, scan count, and ban/delete actions; (2) Submission Moderation — a table of all scan submissions with content preview, verdict, confidence, timestamp, and a delete action; (3) Site Configuration — a settings form allowing admins to edit and save configuration values such as max scans per user and feature toggles.

quotes: Admin panel access with features like: manage users, view/moderate content submissions, and site configuration

acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard has three clearly labeled tabs: User Management, Submission Moderation, and Site Configuration.
User Management tab shows a sortable table with each user's name, principal ID, scan count, and action buttons to ban or delete.
Submission Moderation tab shows all scan submissions with verdict badges, confidence scores, timestamps, and a delete button per row.
Site Configuration tab renders a form with labeled fields for each config key; changes are saved via a submit button with success/error feedback.
All three tabs use React Query mutations/queries and reflect live backend data.
Non-admin users are redirected away from the admin dashboard.
UI matches the existing cyberpunk/dark theme of the app.

requirements.text: Update the admin login page to clearly indicate the admin access path and display a helpful error message when a logged-in user does not have admin privileges, with an option to log out and try a different identity.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin login page shows a clear 'Admin Access' heading and description.
If the authenticated principal is not an admin, an 'Access Denied' error message is shown with a logout/retry option.
Successful admin authentication redirects to the admin dashboard.

constraints: All admin backend functions must enforce role-based access control and reject non-admin principals.
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor.
nonGoals: No new authentication mechanism beyond Internet Identity.
No external database or third-party service integrations.
No real-time notifications or WebSocket features.
No email or SMS alerts for admin events.
